description_long: This hamburger features a stack of classic ingredients, including a golden-brown top bun, a layer of green lettuce, a slice of red tomato, and a wavy slice of pickle. Beneath the vegetables, a slice of melted yellow cheese drapes over a thick, dark brown beef patty. The bottom bun is slightly domed and matches the top in color and texture. The toppings are arranged in a visually appealing, slightly separated manner, making each layer distinct and easy to identify. The surface of the bun is smooth and lacks sesame seeds, and there is no visible packaging present. The overall appearance is appetizing and typical of a freshly assembled hamburger found in urban eateries or food trucks.
description: A classic hamburger with a golden bun, lettuce, tomato, pickles, cheese, and a beef patty, all visually separated and clearly layered. The bun is smooth and free of sesame seeds.
description_view_0: The hamburger is shown with all layers visible, including the top bun, lettuce, tomato, pickles, cheese, and patty, with a clear view of the ingredient separation.
description_view_1: This view highlights the tomato and lettuce layers, with the pickle and cheese also visible; the top bun is seen from a slight angle.
description_view_2: The lettuce and tomato are prominent, with the cheese and patty partially visible beneath; the top bun is seen from the side.
description_view_3: The tomato and lettuce are most visible, with the cheese and patty peeking out; the top bun is shown from a rear angle.
attribute_topping_arrangement: The toppings are stacked in a classic order: pickles and tomato above lettuce, followed by cheese melted over the patty, all between a top and bottom bun. Each ingredient is visually distinct and slightly separated, making the layers easy to identify.
